description: Mapping of Thor-Agent-Kit concepts to Odin Agent Operator Mode equivalents. Status labels: verified=confirmed by repo files, partial=some mapping confirmed, conceptual=structural analogue only, gap=known gap, unsupported=not applicable.

mappings.gap: Odin packet format is Odin-native; not a direct Thor handoff format import
mappings.future_action: define formal bidirectional mapping in LRH-PR-03+

mappings.gap: Odin does not yet implement a dedicated plan envelope type; captured in packet
mappings.future_action: add plan envelope as separate artifact in LRH-PR-03+

mappings.gap: Odin guard is a Python function; not a separate guard model file as in Thor
mappings.future_action: surface guard model as JSON artifact

mappings.gap: Odin uses acceptance_gates array in packet; Thor has a separate expected output contract
mappings.future_action: formalize expected output contract as separate artifact

mappings.gap: Odin return report has senior reviewer simulation; Thor return-plan does not
mappings.future_action: align return manifest fields with Thor return contract

mappings.gap: Odin codex profile is a registry entry; Thor pack produces a file bundle
mappings.future_action: add pack export command in LRH-PR-03+

mappings.gap: Odin does not yet have a repo cognition artifact type
mappings.future_action: add repo cognition artifact in LRH-PR-04+

mappings.gap: task_source in packet captures intent at a summary level only
required_context field lists files; no semantic input classification yet
mappings.future_action: add semantic context classification in LRH-PR-04+
